data.body:
Decision log (vars 7-9):
7. _TICKET_TEST_NO_SYNC — REMOVE (private test flag; fold into REBAR_SYNC_PULL=off / REBAR_SYNC_PUSH=off).
8. TICKET_SYNC_CMD — REMOVE + replace shell-out (dead-by-default: shells 'ticket sync' via shell=True, no such subcommand -> 127 -> no-op; injection smell. Replace sync-before-compact with a direct in-process pull or drop it).
9. REBAR_TICKET_CLI — REMOVE, self-resolve (internal parent->subprocess handoff of the CLI path; never set to non-default; each reconciler/validate subprocess already falls back to in_process_cli() — call it directly and delete the var).
